description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a single stage called test. Add a job named test:1.7 that runs in the test stage using the golang:1.7 Docker image and executes the shell commands `go-wrapper download` followed by `go test`. Add another job named test:1.8 that also runs in the test stage, uses the golang:1.8 Docker image, and runs the same commands `go-wrapper download` and `go test`. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, services, variables, or conditional rules.
